prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021年最低位次约3540名→2022年约3611名（略降）→2023年约2787名（大幅前移约824名）→2024年约2247名（继续前移约540名）→2025年约2251名（基本持平） ，近3年累计前移约1360名，呈明显上升趋势，2025年基准位次约2251名；该校在天津市招生计划持续扩增：2021年20人→2022年20人→2023年25人→2024年30人→2 025年32人；2026年计划25人，较2025年缩招7人（-21.9%），缩招将加剧竞争，推动位次前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 （2026年）主榜第12名（参照哈尔滨工业大学本部），属全国顶尖高校层次，近年排名稳定在前20；2026年声誉评价中性/混合，无明显负面舆情冲击；抖音热 度总排名第10（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，报考关注度持续升温；历史未见明显投档断档记录；哈尔滨工业大学（本部）第五轮学科评估A-及以上学科达17 个，包括力学A+、机械工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、环境科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、软件工程A、控制科学与工程A、电气工程A等，威海校区共享本部学科资源，对相关 专业报考吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐（2024年热度指数分别为77.47、76.86、74.28），与该校主力 招生专业高度契合；天津市考生总数持续增长：2021年54025→2025年71938→2026年约82000（增长约14%），竞争基数扩大；该校位于山东威海，非天津本地高校，但作为C9联盟成员（哈工大本部），跨省吸引力强；university_enroll。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近3年持续前移趋势、2026年计划大幅缩招（-21.9%）、天津市考生总数增长约14%带来的竞争加剧、抖音高热反 映的关注度升温、以及计算机/电子信息等热门专业持续高热，在2025年基准2251名基础上预计竞争进一步加剧；预测最低位次约1926名，区间1706–2146名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术/人工智能方向（工科试验班未来信息内含）
- 自动化/通信工程方向。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息工程/集成电路方向
- 电气工程及其自动化方向。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 网络空间安全方向
- 光电信息科学与工程方向。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年该校在天津仅设工科试验班（未来信息）一个招生专业大类，内含计算机、人工智能、自动化、通信、电子信息、电气等多个方向，入学后可在专业类内任选专业。预测 位次1926名处于区间1706–2146名内，建议位次在区间上限（2146名）附近的考生可大胆冲刺，位次在区间中段（约1926名）的考生录取概率较高，位次明显优于区间下限（1706 名）的考生可重点关注该专业大类内的计算机科学与技术、人工智能等王牌方向。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2021, the lowest ranking was approximately 3540 → in 2022, approximately 3611 (slight decrease) → in 2023, approximately 2787 (significant advance of about 824 places) → in 2024, approximately 2247 (continued advance of about 540 places) → in 2025, approximately 2251 (basically flat). Over the past 3 years, the cumulative advance is about 1360 places, showing a clear upward trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 2251. The university's enrollment plan in Tianjin has been continuously expanding: 20 in 2021 → 20 in 2022 → 25 in 2023 → 30 in 2024 → 32 in 2025; in 2026, the plan is 25, a reduction of 7 ( -21.9%) compared to 2025. The reduction will intensify competition and push the ranking forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science China University Ranking (2026) main list 12th (referencing Harbin Institute of Technology main campus), belonging to the top national university level, with stable rankings in the top 20 in recent years; 2026 reputation evaluation neutral/mixed, no obvious negative public opinion impact; Douyin heat total ranking 10th (high heat), short video platform exposure is large, application attention continues to heat up; no obvious filing gaps in history; Harbin Institute of Technology (main campus) has 17 disciplines rated A- or above in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, including Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Software Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A, Electrical Engineering A, etc. The Weihai campus shares the main campus's discipline resources, which strongly attracts applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and its automation and other majors continue to be highly recommended (2024 heat indices are 77.47, 76.86, 74.28 respectively), which highly matches the university's main enrollment majors; the total number of Tianjin examinees continues to grow: 54025 in 2021 → 71938 in 2025 → about 82000 in 2026 (growth of about 14%), expanding the competition base; the university is located in Weihai, Shandong, not a local Tianjin university, but as a member of the C9 League (HIT main campus), cross-provincial appeal is strong; university_enroll.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the continuous forward trend of historical rankings over the past 3 years, the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (-21.9%), the intensified competition due to the 14% increase in Tianjin examinees, the increased attention reflected by high Douyin heat, and the continued high heat of popular majors like computer/electronic information, competition is expected to further intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 2251; the predicted lowest ranking is about 1926, with a range of 1706–2146.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Science and Technology / Artificial Intelligence direction (Engineering Experimental Class Future Information included)
- Automation / Communication Engineering direction.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Information Engineering / Integrated Circuit direction
- Electrical Engineering and its Automation direction.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Cyberspace Security direction
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering direction.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the university only offers one enrollment major category in Tianjin: Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information), which includes computer, artificial intelligence, automation, communication, electronic information, electrical and other directions. After enrollment, students can choose any major within the category. The predicted ranking of 1926 is within the range of 1706–2146. It is recommended that candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (2146) can boldly aim, candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (about 1926) have a higher probability of admission, and candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (1706) can focus on the top directions within this major category, such as Computer Science and Technology and Artificial Intelligence.
